zh.Buckland, Herfordshire, England: 英國英格蘭賀福爾邦藍
zh.lifeSummary: 當John Gyll於1430年出生在英國英格蘭賀特福爾邦藍時，他的父親Sir Richard Gyll25歲，母親Lady Mary Osborn21歲。他於大約1448年與Johanna Littlebury de Horne在英國賀特福爾邦藍聖 安德也斯 邱奇結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於1499年1月23日在英國賀特福爾邦藍享年69歲，埋葬在英國賀特福爾邦藍。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Gyll于1430年出生在英国英格兰賀特福爾邦藍时，他的父亲Sir Richard Gyll25岁，母亲Lady Mary Osborn21岁。他于大约1448年与Johanna Littlebury de Horne在英国賀特福爾邦藍聖 安德也斯 邱奇结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他去世于1499年1月23日在英国賀特福爾邦藍享年69岁，埋葬在英国賀特福爾邦藍。

nameMeanings.name: Gyll
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Avtar, Amritpal, Darshan, Hardip, Nirmal, Sohan, Ajit, Balwinder, Charan, Jasvir, Kewal, Navdeep.

English and Scottish: in northern England and Scotland sometimes from Middle English Gille, Old Norse Gilli, which is of Irish (Gaelic) origin (see below), and pronounced with a hard g. As a personal name it is not found after c. 1200.

English and Scottish: topographic name from Middle English gille ‘deep glen, ravine’ (Old Norse (Norwegian) gil), pronounced with a hard g. The term is found mainly in northwestern England, where Norwegian Vikings settled.

variants.name: Gilliam
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Gill(i)am, Gillem, Old French Guillaume, a Parisian form of Will(i)am (see William ).

variants.name: Gills
meanings: English: variant of Gill , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s. Alternatively, if pronounced with soft G-, possibly a variant of Giles .

variants.name: Gilson
meanings: English: ‘son of Gill’, from a Middle English pet form of either the female name Gillian (Latin Juliana), or of the male names Gilliam, a variant of William, and Giles. + -son. See Gill .
English: patronymic meaning ‘son of Giles’, from the personal name Giles + -son.
Irish (Down): adopted for Mac Giolla Seanáin, see Gilsenan .

variants.name: Guile
meanings: English (Sussex): altered form of Gyle, probably a variant of Gill .

variants.name: Gillan
meanings: Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Giolláin, from a diminutive of giolla ‘lad, servant, devotee’. Compare Gill .

variants.name: Gilli
meanings: Swiss German and South German: from a pet form of the personal name   Gill   ‘Giles’.
Italian: patronymic or plural form of the personal name Gillio, a vernacular derivative of Aegilius, a later form of Latin Aegidius (see Giles 1).
French (southern): of Italian origin (see 2 above) or a variant of   Gilles  .

variants.name: Gell
meanings: English (northern): from Middle English Gelle, a pet form of the personal name Gerard. Gerard in Middle English was indistinguishable from Gerald, of which Gelle was a syncopated form.

English: occasionally, a variant of Gill , from a pet form of the personal name Jelion or Gillian. These are Middle English versions of Julian, found mainly as a female name, occasionally as a male name.
Manx: variant of Gill , a shortened form of Gaelic Mac Gille, meaning ‘son of the lad (i.e. servant)’.

nameMeanings.name: John
meanings: Greek: the Lord gave graciously; whom Jehovah gave; whom Jehovah bestowed.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When John Gyll was born in 1430, in Buckland, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Richard Gyll, was 25 and his mother, Lady Mary Osborn, was 21. He married Johanna Littlebury de Horne about 1448, in St Andrew's Church, Buckland, Hertfordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 5 daughters. He died on 23 January 1499, in Buckland, Hertfordshire, England, at the age of 69, and was buried in Buckland, Hertfordshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Gyll est né en 1430, à Buckland, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Richard Gyll, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Lady Mary Osborn, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Johanna Littlebury de Horne environ 1448, à St Andrew's Church, Buckland, Hertfordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 5 filles. Il est décédé le 23 janvier 1499, à Buckland, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 69 ans, et a été enterré à Buckland, Hertfordshire, Angleterre.

de.St Andrew's Church, Buckland, Hertfordsh: St Andrew's Church, Buckland, Hertfordshire, England
de.lifeSummary: Als John Gyll 1430 in Buckland, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Richard Gyll 25 und seine Mutter Lady Mary Osborn 21. Er hat um 1448 in St Andrew's Church, Buckland, Hertfordshire, England Johanna Littlebury de Horne geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er starb am 23. Januar 1499 im Alter von 69 Jahren in Buckland, Hertfordshire, England und wurde in Buckland, Hertfordshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Gyll è nato il nel 1430 nel Buckland, Hertfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir Richard Gyll, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Lady Mary Osborn, aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato Johanna Littlebury de Horne circa 1448, nel St Andrew's Church, Buckland, Hertfordshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 5 figlie. Morì il 23 gennaio 1499, nel Buckland, Hertfordshire, England, all'età di 69 anni, e fu sepolto a Buckland, Hertfordshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: John Gyllが1430年にイギリスイギリスハートフォードシュアイアブックランドで生まれた時，父Sir Richard Gyllは25歳，母Lady Mary Osbornは21歳であった。約1448年にイギリスハートフォードシュアイアブックランドスト アンドリュー'ス チャーチでJohanna Littlebury de Horneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1499年1月23日にイギリスハートフォードシュアイアブックランドで69歳で死去し，イギリスハートフォードシュアイアブックランドにて埋葬された。

ko.St Andrew's Church, Buckland, Hertfordsh: 영국 허트퍼드실르 벅랜드 스트 앤드루'스 c후르치
ko.lifeSummary: John Gyll(이)가 1430년 영국 잉글랜드 허트퍼드실르 벅랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Richard Gyll(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Mary Osborn(은)는 21세였다. 그는 대략 1448년 영국 허트퍼드실르 벅랜드 스트 앤드루'스 c후르치에서 Johanna Littlebury de Horne(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1499년 1월 23일 영국 허트퍼드실르 벅랜드에서 69세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 허트퍼드실르 벅랜드에 묻혔다.

pt.St Andrew's Church, Buckland, Hertfordsh: St Andrew's Church, Buckland, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra
pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Gyll nasceu em 1430, em Buckland, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Richard Gyll, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Lady Mary Osborn, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Johanna Littlebury de Horne aproximadamente 1448, em St Andrew's Church, Buckland, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele faleceu em 23 de janeiro de 1499, em Buckland, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, com 69 anos, e foi sepultado em Buckland, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra.

ru.St Andrew's Church, Buckland, Hertfordsh: ст андрю'с чурч, буккланд, хиртфордшир, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Gyll родился в 1430 г. в местности буккланд, хиртфордшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir Richard Gyll было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Mary Osborn, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Johanna Littlebury de Horne около 1448 г. в местности ст андрю'с чурч, буккланд, хиртфордшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 5 дочерей. Он умер 23 января 1499 г. в местности буккланд, хиртфордшир, Англия в возрасте 69 лет и был похоронен в местности буккланд, хиртфордшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Gyll nació en 1430, en Buckland, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir Richard Gyll, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Lady Mary Osborn, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Johanna Littlebury de Horne aproximadamente 1448, en St Andrew's Church, Buckland, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió el 23 de enero de 1499, en Buckland, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 69 años, y fue sepultado en Buckland, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra.
